raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N Dahwids fazzija:
Irrag wehl kahds/ kas
atlizzis no Saula
Namma/ ka es tam Schehlasti-
bu parahdn/ Jonatana tabbad:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Saula Namnam bija
weens Kalps/ tain btja Zihbus
Wahrda/ un tas tappe aizinahts
preekſch Dahwida. Un tas Keh-
ninsch fazzija us to: Eſti tu Zih-
bus? un wiꞥſch fazzija: Taws
Kalps.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neggi wehl kas atleek no Saula
Namma/ ka es Deewa Scheh-
lastibn tam parahdu? un Zihbus
fazztja us to Kehnixu: Wehl tur
irr weens Dehls Jonatana tiſlis
us abbejahm Kahjahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch fazzija
us to: Kur irr tas? Un Zihbus
fazztja us to Kehnixu: Diangi/
wisch irr Makira ta Dehla Am.
mieta Namna eekſch Lodabara.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nofuhtija tas Keh-
ninsch Dahwids/ un nehme to no
Makira Ammieta Dehla Nam-
ma no Lodabara.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu Mewibosets Jona-
tana ta Dehla Saula Dehls pee
Dahwida nahze/ mettehs wiꞥſch
us fawn Waiqu/ un peelubdse.
Un Dahwids fazzija: Mewibo-
sets? un wiꞥſch fazzija: Redſſche
taws Kalps.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids fazzija us tv:
Ne bibstees/ es teescham tew
Schehlastibu parahdischu tawa
Tehwa Jonatana labbad/ un at-
dohſchu tew wiffus Tihrunus
tawa Lehwa Saula/ un tew
buhs weenumehr Maisi ehst pee
manna Galda.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad paklannijahs wiꞥſch/
un fazzija: Kas irr taws Kalps/
ka tu usluhkojs effi weenu nomir-
rufchu Sunni/ itt ka es efimu?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad aizinaja tas Kehninsch
Zihbu/ Sanla Puift/ un fazzi
ja us to: Wifs kas Saulam ut
wižna Namnam peederreja/ ef-
mu es tawa Kunga Dehla-
dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz strahda tu t
Semini/ lihdj ar taweem Deh-
leem un ar taweem Kalpeem/ u-
eewedd to/ ka tawa Kunga Deh-
lam Maisi irr/no ka wiꞥſch war
usturretees/ un lai Mewiboset-
tawa Kunga Dehls weenumeh
Maisi ehſ pee manna Galda
Bet Zihbum bija peezpadefinits
Dehlu/ un dtwidefinits Kalpu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Zihbus fazzija us t
Kehnian: Wiſtu / ko man-
Kungs tas Kehninsch fawa-
Kalpam paweht/ to darrihs tan-
Kalps.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un laid Mewibosets p-
manna Galda ehidans irr
patt/ ka weens no teein Kehnt-
Behrneem. Un Mewibosetam
weens masajs Dehls/ tam bi-
Mitkus Wahrda/ un wifs/ �
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
